nonGoals: Do NOT add any new collector or rule
Do NOT add comment referencing language_tiers.go (does not exist)
Do NOT modify any test files
Do NOT alter any other constant or function in init_cmd.go
objective: Remove the dead lint-clean (SwiftLint) rule from the swiftStandardPolicy constant in cmd/certify/init_cmd.go
planText: Open cmd/certify/init_cmd.go and locate the swiftStandardPolicy constant (line ~704). Delete the 8-line lint-clean rule block (lines 709–716): the 7 YAML lines defining the rule plus the trailing blank line. This rule references metric: lint_errors but no SwiftLint collector exists, causing fabricated grades. After removal, swiftStandardPolicy will have exactly 3 rules: test-pass, no-todos, and max-complexity. Run go build -o build/bin/certify ./cmd/certify/ to confirm clean compilation, then go test ./... -count=1 to confirm no tests break. Confirm via grep that 'SwiftLint' no longer appears in any .go file.
